key_concepts: During deployment, the pipeline will inevitably observe new category levels never processed previously.
Algorithms processing one-hot tracking strict indices will crash upon facing unrecognized label arrays.
Defining clear default fallbacks like creating an 'Other' or 'Unknown' category early mitigates functional structural crashes.

definitions.definition: Kelas klasifikasi variabel target yang muncul secara perdana murni pada evaluasi tes produksi observasional lapang.

examples: A model trained on existing phone brands encounters a new startup brand the following year.
